name: plx-mission-control
install: (command -v apt-get >/dev/null && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y python3-venv python3-dev build-essential libpq-dev || true) && (if [ -d .swarm/.git ]; then git -C .swarm pull --ff-only || true; else git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/petralabx/agentic-swarm.git .swarm; fi) && python3 -m venv .swarm/.venv && .swarm/.venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && .swarm/.venv/bin/pip install -e ./.swarm && npm ci && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt

terminals.name: swarm
terminals.command: cd .swarm && DATABASE_URL="" CHECKPOINTER_BACKEND=memory AWS_REGION="${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1}" .venv/bin/python -m src.main serve --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8900
terminals.description: agentic-swarm dispatch API on 127.0.0.1:8900 (cloned to ./.swarm; in-memory checkpointer; secrets hydrated from AWS Secrets Manager prod/ec2-secrets)

terminals.name: mc
terminals.description: PLX Mission Control (Next.js) dev server on :3000
